action.description:
Introduced by Senators Roys, Larson and Ratcliff; 
cosponsored by Representatives Vining, Hong, Cruz, Phelps, Sheehan, Arney, Bare, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Hysell, Joers, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Prado, Sinicki, Subeck, Tenorio, Udell and Spaude
